title: E2E for supported device page and color theme flow
scenario: End-to-end onboarding flow verification including welcome page, EULA, guest login, PPIP dialog, permissions, device selection, color theme in main menu, and about page navigation
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Accept the EULA (End User License Agreement).
4. Tap "Continue as Guest" to proceed without signing in.
5. Handle the PPIP (Personal Privacy Information Protection) dialog if displayed.
8. On the Device Selection page, verify the list of supported devices is displayed.
9. Tap the Main Menu (hamburger icon) in the top-left corner.
11. Verify the Color Theme options are displayed and selectable.
12. Navigate back to the Home screen.
13. Open the Main Menu again and select "About".
14. Verify the About page content is accessible and displayed correctly.
15. Use the back navigation (hardware or software back button) repeatedly to traverse back through all previous screens.
16. Confirm that back navigation works correctly at each step without unexpected exits or crashes.
expected: The user can successfully complete the full flow: Welcome page displays correctly, EULA is accepted, guest flow proceeds without errors, PPIP dialog is handled, location permission is granted, onboarding screens are shown, device selection page lists supported devices, Color Theme option is accessible in the main menu, About page content is displayed, and back navigation works correctly throughout without crashes or unexpected behavior.
